name: Chicken and Sausage Cassoulet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Carrots, cut into 1/2-inch pieces, about 4 medium
recipeInstructions:
1. In the crockpot, combine undrained beans, tomato juice, carrots, celery, onion, garlic, bay leaves, chicken bouillon, basil, and oregano.
2. Place the frozen chicken on top of the bean mixture.
3. Cut the sausage in half lengthwise and slice it.
4. Place the sliced sausage on top of the chicken.
5. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
6. Remove bay leaves before serving.
